example_text: \paragraph{Uncertainty and calibration.} State estimates are more useful when uncertainty is reliable. Calibration analysis checks whether confidence or covariance summaries align with empirical error behavior \cite{guo2017calibration}. The calibration figure in this manuscript is interpreted as a diagnostic for the evaluated runs, not as a deployment guarantee or a full posterior validation.
interpretation_boundary: Validation confirms artifact presence and citation coverage, not scientific correctness beyond recorded experiment outputs.
